{{Infobox location
| name = Colony
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Colonies are diverse settlements found throughout the galaxy, varying significantly based on their political affiliation. [[Galactic Union]] colonies often consist of metallic rings in space or specialized structures like [[Ironville]], a scrapper colony focused on recycling junk. In contrast, [[Free Worlds]] colonies exhibit more individuality; some appear as mountains filled with machinery and tunnels, while others are modular rectangular outposts or laboratory-like facilities on unsettled moons. Some colonies exist as massive megacities, and others are subject to seizure or invasion by the [[Legion]]. A unique entity known as the [[Zenith Colony]], associated with [[Shadow Ark]], functions as a refuge for inhabitants. This specific colony possesses extraordinary properties: it can be larger than a moon, can unfold like paper to expand its size, and contains an internal space capable of holding entire star systems under a violet sky. It is also described as being difficult to locate.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The seal hit the wall of the [[Colony]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Colony]] is a location from which materials must be obtained.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] needs the [[Colony]]'s help.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Colony]] would be defenseless if they ended up in [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Colony]] is a character that can snap and speak.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
